title: Contact | Diana Johnson MP
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Diana Johnson MP top of page Diana Johnson MP Listening, working and delivering for you in Hull North and Cottingham Home About Advice Contact Newsletters News All news News Archive More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Contact Diana You can contact Diana in any of the following ways: E-mail: Johnsond@parliament.uk Write: Dame Diana Johnson MP, House of Commons, Westminster London SW1A 0AA Hull Constituency Office phone number: 01482 319135 Please always provide your full address and postcode Book Here You can also keep up to date with my work by following me on: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DianaJohnsonHullNorth Twitter: https://twitter.com/DianaJohnsonMP Instagram: dianajohnsonhull ​ Please note I do not respond to casework via social media, please contact me as above if you have an issue to raise. © Diana Johnson MP 2026 Privacy Policy bottom of page
